parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 256, system: $json.systemPrompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.userMessage }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Parse Claude Response').first().json.lead.id, direction: 'outbound', body: $('Parse Claude Response').first().json.sms_text, trigger_type: $('Build Claude Prompt').first().json.triggerType, demo: $('Parse Claude Response').first().json.demo_mode }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ intent_score: $json.intent_score, stage: $json.stage, sequence_step: $json.sequence_step, sms_count: $json.sms_count, last_sms_at: $json.last_sms_at, next_follow_up: $json.next_follow_up }) }}

meta.notes: Core SMS engine. Called by WF01 (first_contact) and WF04 (follow-up sequence). Fetches lead + inventory, generates SMS via Claude Haiku, skips Twilio if demo_mode=true, logs to sms_log, updates lead record, triggers WF05 if intent=hot.
